'''Kreigg''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Commander/Legends|commander]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] who served as a tactical [[Advisor/Legends|advisor]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="timeline">The [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'' is centered around the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].</ref> A loyal Imperial [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]], Kreigg earned [[Grand Moff/Legends|Grand Moff]] [[Wilhuff Tarkin/Legends|Wilhuff Tarkin's]] favor for his cunning during a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack on the [[Moff/Legends|Moff's]] [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]]. Kreigg had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and light-colored skin.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Commander Kreigg first appeared on a card for the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s [[2001]] ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]''.<ref name="JKTCG" />
